creator: m.seaman@infracaninophile.co.uk
text:
The long awaited stable release 0.9.8 of sphinxsearch.

Changes to the port include:

   * files/patch-src-sphinxsearch.h removed -- incorporated upstream
   * add new option to control linking against libiconv
   * correct use of NOPORTDOC vs. NOPORTEXAMPLES
   * dynamically generate the list of example files installed
   * now includes additional API examples for ruby, python and java
